data.body: S1 pushed for review: Gerrit change #582 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/582). Local pre-flight green except two non-S1 artifacts: (1) resolve_symbol third-party test fails locally only because the venv is nested in the worktree (CI unaffected); (2) schema-coverage [idea] errored due to my S1 commit moving HEAD while make test ran concurrently — passes in isolation. Neither reproduces in CI. Next: live refs/meta/config cutover of the Autosubmit label (surgical add via admin).
